description: Per-SDK warmup iteration counts for stable benchmark results

nodejs.notes: V8 JIT needs warmup for optimization

java.notes: JVM HotSpot needs significant warmup for tiered compilation

go.notes: Go has minimal warmup needs (AOT compiled)

c.notes: C has minimal warmup (native code), mostly cache warming

variance_threshold.notes: Coefficient of variation >5% indicates need for more warmup
